title: Add per-page animations, add a final Yes page, and ensure all images are transparent

requirements.text: Add noticeable, cute animations to each page in the Valentine flow (FirstNamePage, LastNamePage, LoveSliderPage, ValentineMainPage, WrongAnswerPage), including an on-enter transition for the main card/content so each step feels animated when it appears.

quotes: ok final fixes, add animations to each page

acceptanceCriteria: Each step/page visibly animates in when it is shown (e.g., fade/scale/slide-in on the main card content).
Animations are consistent with the existing Valentine theme and do not block form inputs or navigation.
Existing slider-completion hearts burst animation still works and still auto-navigates to the main Valentine page.

requirements.text: When the user presses "Yes" on the main Valentine page, navigate to a new final confirmation/celebration page instead of showing a browser alert.

quotes: and if yes is pressed have a final page

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the "Yes" button on the main Valentine page routes to a new final celebration page within the existing App.tsx step flow (no alert is shown).
The final page contains celebratory Valentine-themed UI and at least one clear action (e.g., restart/go back).
The existing "No" flow still navigates to the WrongAnswerPage and the Go Back button still returns to the main Valentine page.

requirements.text: Ensure all generated image assets used by the app have transparent backgrounds (alpha channel), including the background pattern image if it is retained as an image asset.

quotes: Have all images have transparent backgrounds aswell

acceptanceCriteria: All PNG assets under /assets/generated used by the UI render without a visible non-transparent box/background around the illustrated elements (where applicable).
If the background image (valentine-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) is used, it has transparency so the existing gradient overlay can show through cleanly.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Do not modify immutable hook/entry files: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx.
Do not serve images via the backend; keep using static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated.
nonGoals: Adding background music or sound effects.
Adding backend persistence or any Motoko backend features (backend/main.mo remains unchanged unless explicitly required later).
Adding third-party auth providers beyond Internet Identity.

edits: Ensure fully transparent background/alpha channel (valentine-bg.dim_1920x1080.png > valentine-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Ensure fully transparent background/alpha channel (heart-mascot.dim_512x512.png > heart-mascot.dim_512x512.png)
Ensure fully transparent background/alpha channel (mad-emoji.dim_256x256.png > mad-emoji.dim_256x256.png)
